svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="ChatGPT"> <diagram id="mka-lifecycle" name="MKA Lifecycle"> <mxGraphModel dx="2380" dy="1278" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1700" pageHeight="1200" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;" value="MKA Lifecycle" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="400" x="650" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="init" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=17;" value="<b>macsec_init()</b><br/>Initialize MACsec and MKA context" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="620" x="540" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wait" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFDE7;strokeColor=#F9A825;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="<b>WAIT_MKA</b><br/>Participant is active, but no SAK is installed yet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="660" x="520" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tick" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=17;" value="<b>macsec_tick()</b><br/>Advance timers and MKA state" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="430" x="170" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="txready" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFDE7;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="Control frame ready?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="145" width="290" x="240" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="getframe" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#EF6C00;fontSize=16;" value="<b>macsec_get_control_frame()</b><br/>Build and return MKPDU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="530" x="120" y="750" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tx" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=16;" value="<b>Ethernet Driver</b><br/>Transmit MKA / EAPOL frame" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="530" x="120" y="900" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rx" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=16;" value="<b>Peer MKPDU received</b><br/>Ethernet driver passes frame to macsec_input()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="500" x="1050" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="input" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#EF6C00;fontSize=16;" value="<b>macsec_input()</b><br/>Parse and authenticate MKPDU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="500" x="1050" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="peer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#EF6C00;fontSize=16;" value="<b>Update MKA participant</b><br/>Peer state, election, key distribution" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="500" x="1050" y="690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sak" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFDE7;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="Valid SAK available?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="310" x="1145" y="840" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="install" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F1F8E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=16;" value="<b>Install SAK</b><br/>Configure TX and RX secure associations" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="580" x="1010" y="1040" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="secured" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=18;" value="<b>SECURED</b><br/>Protected data traffic can flow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="480" x="560" y="1040" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#777777;dashed=1;fontSize=13;" value="The cycle continues after SECURED: periodic MKPDUs maintain liveness and may distribute a new SAK during rekey." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="760" x="560" y="1160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="init" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="wait"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="wait" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="tick"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="tick" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="txready"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="txready" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="getframe" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="txready" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="tick" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="getframe" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="tx"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="rx" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="input"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="input" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="peer"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="peer" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="sak"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="sak" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="wait" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="850" y="915" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="sak" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="install" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="install" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="secured"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="secured" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;exitX=0.292;exitY=0.029;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" target="tick" value="Periodic maintenance / rekey"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="700" y="430" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
